name: Frontline Ambulance
description: Primary emergency response, patient transport, and frontline ambulance operations.

name: Clinical Support
description: Advanced clinical support, specialist paramedic response, and complex patient oversight.

name: HART
description: Hazardous Area Response Team providing specialist response to CBRN, confined space, and high-risk incidents.

name: HEMS
description: Air ambulance and critical care response for severe trauma and time-critical incidents.

name: Clinical Education
description: Clinical education, mentoring, university placements, and workforce development.

name: Driver Training
description: Blue light driving instruction, response driving assessments, and fleet training support.

name: Patient Safety & Governance
description: Clinical governance, patient safety investigations, audit, and learning from incidents.

name: Operational Resilience
description: Major incident planning, emergency preparedness, tactical support, and resilience coordination.
